description: Natural-language Instacart CLI that talks directly to the web GraphQL API. Add items to your cart, search products, and manage carts across retailers without browser automation.
killer_feature: instacart add costco "2% milk" -- sub-second natural-language cart-add via direct GraphQL POST, no browser
notable: First CLI to manipulate a real Instacart cart via direct GraphQL, not Playwright
Three-call resolution chain: ShopCollectionScoped -> Autosuggestions -> Items
Hash for UpdateCartItemsMutation extracted from Apollo persistedQueryLink by mock-forward technique
kooky Chrome cookie extraction with JSON import-file fallback for newer Chrome macOS
